name: Endorse
text1: Choose 1 player and place their control token on this card. That player does not have to spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability of any strategy card. Discard this card at the end of the status phase.

name: Enfilade
text1: Place 1 structure on a planet you control, or destroy 1 structure, twice. Then, each other player may place 1 PDS on a planet they control.

name: Sanctuary
text1: Choose 1 system that contains a planet you control. Each other player places a command token from their reinforcements in that system.

name: Spoil
text1: Each other player loses trade goods equal to their commodity value. Then, replenish your commodities.

name: Spite
text1: Choose tactic pool, fleet pool, or strategy pool; each other player removes 1 command token from that pool and returns that token to their reinforcements.
